currentState: Parallel truth-tellers finally aligned. Corin has the manifests and magical proof; Havel has the street map and worker pattern. Each man's evidence makes the other impossible to dismiss.
powerDynamic: Neither outranks the other in what matters here. Corin owns the institutional paper trail; Havel owns the district's lived behavior.

physicalDynamics.pattern: Their papers crowd the same table from opposite directions, with Havel's district sheets and Corin's copied route marks finally pointing at the same square.

nameUsage.corinCallsHavel: Havel, with the matter-of-fact trust of someone naming the one militia officer who has been seeing the same thing.
nameUsage.havelCallsCorin: Treats him as the mage-side equivalent of his own problem: useful, overworked, and ignored.

history.event: Chapter7 is the first time their separate warnings fully lock together in front of people able to act on them.

trajectory: Separate buried warnings -> converged local alliance.
